input: Hi Will, congrats on moving on to Round 2 of interviews. We elected for the take home in Round 2 as the team is traveling.
I've been having this sharp pain in my lower back after sitting for too long.
Can you summarize this article on the history of Rome?
Got my blood test results back. LDL cholesterol is 110, HDL is 65.
Here is a list of skills I want to add to my resume: Python, LangGraph, Machine Learning.
Let's plan a trip to Japan next year. We should visit Kyoto and Tokyo.
I am feeling really burned out and anxious about the upcoming project deadline at work.
Should I negotiate my salary offer from Google? They offered 150k base.
Can we set up a new project note for repairing the Pilot's AC blower motor?
I need to start taking 10mg of Lexapro daily.
